articles.author: Francesco De Meo
articles.title: ‘PlayStation 6 Is Not Many Years Away’: Leaks Suggest Sony Is Working On Imminent Generational Transition With Handheld Support and ‘PlayGo’ Smart Delivery - Wccftech
articles.description: PlayStation 6 is not many years away as leaks reveal SDK 13 PlayGo support and Power Saver Mode updates that suggest a generational transition is imminent
articles.content: In the past few weeks, we heard the PlayStation 6 could be delayed way past a late 2027/ early 2028 release window due to the current challenging economic conditions, but multiple leaks from Moore's … [+3497 chars]
